item.description:
# Clip 1.3.3
Clip 1.3.3 fixes native Friend joining and makes the **Actual** viewer size consistent across Retina and non-Retina Macs.
## Live Share
- Reserve each encrypted Friend-join message sequence before sending it, so concurrent WebRTC offer and ICE messages cannot reuse a sequence number and be rejected as an invalid native rendezvous message. - Keep a route closed if it disconnects while approval is being sent instead of restoring stale connection state afterward. - Define **Actual** using the source Mac's logical window size rather than the viewer display's backing scale. Retina-hosted windows therefore no longer appear doubled on non-Retina viewers, and external-display windows no longer appear halved on Retina viewers. - Preserve the existing decoded-pixel fallback when viewing a stream from an older host that does not provide logical source dimensions.
This is an app-only update. The Live Share server and web viewer are unchanged.
## Requirements
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon. This build uses the same stable Apple Development identity as previous updater releases.
